description: Database schema setup — all core tables (workspaces, teams, issues, projects, cycles, initiatives, labels, views, comments, reactions, notifications) with Drizzle ORM migrations pushed to Postgres
Redis connection setup for real-time sync, caching, and pub/sub. ElastiCache client configuration with ioredis
S3 storage setup for file attachments and avatars. Upload/download utilities with presigned URLs
SES email setup for magic link auth emails and notifications. Email sending utility with templates
Google OAuth login via Better Auth. 'Continue with Google' button on login page, OAuth redirect flow, account creation on first login, session creation
Email magic link login via Better Auth + SES. 'Continue with Email' flow: enter email → receive magic link with 6-digit code → click link or enter code → session created
Session management and protected routes. Next.js middleware checking Better Auth sessions. Redirect unauthenticated users to /login. Sessions stored in Postgres via Drizzle adapter
Login/signup page UI. Clean minimal page with 'Continue with Google' and 'Continue with Email' buttons. Linear-style branding. Dark theme. Handles both login and signup
Workspace creation flow. After first login, user creates a workspace: enter name + URL slug. Auto-creates a default team with the workspace name. Redirects to main dashboard
Invite team members step (skippable). After workspace creation, prompt to invite teammates by email. Enter multiple emails, select role. Skip button available

Empty states for all core features. Issues list: 'No issues' with create CTA. Projects: empty with create CTA. Cycles: 'No active cycle'. Inbox: 'You're all caught up'. My Issues: 'No issues assigned'
App shell layout — sidebar (244px) + content area with 12px border-radius. Dark/light theme support. Workspace switcher in top-left. Search button. Create issue button (+). Help menu bottom-left

Sidebar navigation — Personal section (Inbox, My Issues), Workspace section (Projects, Views, More), Teams section (per-team: Triage, Issues, Projects, Views), Initiatives, Cycles. Collapsible team sections

Design system foundations — Inter font, color tokens (dark: #090909/#0f0f11, light: #f5f5f5/#fcfcfd), accent #7180ff, priority icons (Urgent/High/Medium/Low/None), status circle icons, avatar component, label chips

Issues list view — table/list grouped by workflow state (Backlog, In Progress, Done, Canceled). Each row: identifier (ENG-123), title, assignee avatar, priority icon, labels, project, date. 'Add new issue' button per group
Issues board view — Kanban columns by status. Each column: header with count, issue cards with title, identifier, priority icon, labels, assignee avatar. Drag & drop between columns

Issue detail page — full-width view with editable title (contenteditable), rich text description, properties sidebar (Status, Priority, Assignee, Labels, Project), sub-issues section, activity feed, comment composer with reactions and attachments

Create issue modal — team selector, title field (contenteditable), description field (rich text), bottom toolbar with Status/Priority/Assignee/Project/Labels combobox dropdowns, 'More actions' overflow, file attachment, 'Create more' toggle, 'Create issue' submit

Display options panel — List/Board layout toggle, Columns grouping (Status), Rows sub-grouping, Ordering (Priority), toggleable display properties (ID, Status, Assignee, Priority, Project, Due date, Milestone, Labels, Links, Time in status, Created, Updated, PRs). Save as team default
Filter bar — 'Add filter' button on issue lists. Filter by Status, Priority, Assignee, Label, Project, Cycle, Due date, Creator, Estimate. Composable filters with AND/OR logic
Projects list page — table with columns: Name (with emoji icon), Health, Priority, Lead (avatar), Target date, Status (% progress ring). All projects view with filter/sort

Project detail page — Overview tab: emoji icon, title, description, properties sidebar (Status, Priority, Lead, Members, Dates, Teams, Slack, Labels), Resources section, 'Write first project update' CTA, Milestones list with progress bars (% of N issues), Progress section (scope/completed/assignees/labels breakdown). Activity tab. Issues tab (filtered issue list grouped by status)

Inbox page — notification list showing avatar, issue identifier, title, actor name, action description (assigned, mentioned, status change, duplicate), relative timestamp. Unread indicator (blue dot). Filter and priority sort buttons. Right panel shows selected notification detail. Mark as read on click

My Issues page — Tabs: Assigned, Created, Subscribed, Activity. Issues grouped by workflow status (Triage, Active, Backlog). Each row: status icon, identifier, title, labels, project breadcrumb, assignee avatar, date. Filter bar and display options. Shows count of hidden issues

Cycles page — empty state with explanation text ('Cycles are a great way to manage iterative development...'). When configured: cycle list with current/upcoming/past sections, progress bar, issue count. Cycle detail shows issues grouped by status. Cycles auto-start/end on schedule. Configure cycle length and start date in team settings

Initiatives page — tabs: Active, Planned, Completed. Empty state with explanation ('Initiatives are larger, strategic product efforts...'). Create new initiative shortcut (N then I). Initiative detail: title, description, linked projects with progress, status updates

Triage queue — list of incoming issues in Triage status. Each row: title, identifier, creator avatar, creator name, relative timestamp. Count badge ('68 issues to triage'). 'Create triage issue' button. Filter and sort controls. Triage actions: accept (move to backlog/active) or decline (close/move)

Command palette (Cmd+K) — search input with 'Type a command or search...' placeholder. Grouped commands: Views (Create view), Issues (Create new issue C, Create in fullscreen V, Create label), Projects (New project update N+U, Create project N+P), Documents (Create document), Filter (Search workspace, Find view Cmd+F), Templates (issue/document/project templates), Navigation (Open last issue, Open in desktop). Search shows 'Quick results for {query}' with matching issues. Bottom bar: Open (Enter), Advanced search (Cmd+/), More actions, Quick look

Custom Views page — Tabs: Issues, Projects. List of views with Name and Owner columns. Personal views section ('Only visible to you'). Create view button (+). Each view is a saved filter/display configuration that renders as a filtered issue list or project list
